name: OptiExtract AI: The Ultimate Image SEO & Performance Auditor
description: 🚀 THE PROBLEM: Unoptimized images are the #1 cause of slow websites and poor SEO. Manually auditing tags is a tedious bottleneck for developers. 🧠 THE SOLUTION: OptiExtract AI automates the audit using Gemini AI. 🛠️ FEATURES: AI-powered context analysis, automated responsive strategies (srcset/sizes), and one-click PDF/Excel reporting. ⚡ THE BENEFIT: Boost Core Web Vitals, improve accessibility, and save hours of manual work with production-ready optimization reports.
